name: Eric W. Dugas
currentRole: Chief Financial Officer, US LBM Holdings
formerRole: Vice President, Finance and Chief Accounting Officer, Clean Harbors, Inc
connectionToCompany: Eric Dugas served as VP Finance and Chief Accounting Officer at Clean Harbors, working closely with the CFO office including Michael L. Battles on financial reporting and SEC filings. He departed Clean Harbors and moved into senior finance roles at other companies
sourceNote: Identified via Clean Harbors SEC filings listing executive officers and public financial disclosures
